type.description: Whether the registered agent is a Commercial Registered Agent (CRA) or a Noncommercial Registered Agent. Enum: 'commercial' | 'noncommercial'.

name.description: Full name of the registered agent (used by LLC/LP/LLP/NP filings; mirrors clerk.name on Business Corp filings since BCs use 'clerk' terminology while LLCs use 'registered agent').

cra_public_number.description: Maine SOS Commercial Registered Agent (CRA) public registration number; required only when registered_agent.type = 'commercial'.

physical_address.description: Physical-location address of the registered agent (NOT a P.O. Box). Single-line: street, city, state, zip.

mailing_address.description: Optional mailing address of the registered agent if different from physical location.

formation_effective_date_choice.description: Whether the LLC's effective date is the date of filing or a later specified date. Enum: 'on_filing' | 'later_specified'.

formation_effective_date.description: Specific later effective date (only set when entity.formation_effective_date_choice = 'later_specified').

is_low_profit_llc.description: Boolean elect-in for L3C (low-profit) status under 31 MRSA §1611, with statutory qualifications A–D.

is_professional_llc.description: Boolean elect-in for professional-LLC status under 13 MRSA Chapter 22-A.

statement_of_authority_exhibit_letter.description: Optional exhibit letter referencing an initial statement of authority (per 31 MRSA §1542.1) attached to the certificate of formation.

printed_name_and_title.description: Printed name and title of the authorized person who signed (e.g., 'Member', 'Manager', 'Authorized Person').

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.
